page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C processors. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 128 physical cores and 128 vCPUs, indicating a single thread per core configuration. The processor runs at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz.

The instance features 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. A key characteristic of the ecs.i5.32xlarge is its integrated local storage, which consists of 30717 GB of SSD capacity. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 320 Gbps. No GPUs are included in this configuration.

From a resource density perspective, the high volume of local SSD storage bundled directly with 1024.0 GB of RAM provides a dense hardware profile for data-intensive workloads. However, the lack of hyperthreading means parallel execution is strictly mapped to physical cores, which may limit certain highly threaded software architectures compared to hyperthreaded alternatives. The absence of GPU accelerators also restricts its utility for hardware-accelerated machine learning tasks.

Given the massive local SSD storage capacity and the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is designed for large-scale databases, high-throughput storage systems, and memory-intensive data processing applications that require low-latency local disk access and high network throughput.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.32xlarge is an x86_64 server instance running on a KVM hypervisor, equipped with a dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor. It features 128 physical cores and 128 vCPUs operating at 3.4 GHz with a single thread per core. The hardware configuration includes 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core, alongside 30717 GB of local SSD storage. Network performance is supported by a 320 Gbps baseline bandwidth. This instance does not include GPU acceleration. The combination of high-capacity local SSD storage and a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes this instance suitable for large-scale database deployments, storage-intensive applications, and memory-heavy data processing workloads requiring rapid local read and write operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.32xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 1024 GB RAM, 30717 GB of local SSD storage, and 320 Gbps network bandwidth for database workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.32xlarge features 128 Intel Xeon cores, 1024 GB RAM, 30717 GB local SSD, and 320 Gbps bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor.
tagline: A dedicated x86_64 platform featuring one hundred and twenty-eight cores, one terabyte of memory, and thirty terabytes of local SSD storage.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C cores running at 3.4 GHz
1024.0 GB of system memory with 8.0 GB per core
30717 GB of integrated local SSD storage
KVM hypervisor with single thread per core configuration
Designed for large-scale databases and storage-intensive workloads
